name: EU AI Act Code of Practice

controls.title: Chapter I — Transparency
controls.description: Transparency obligations for all GPAI model providers under Article 53 of the AI Act.

controls.title: Commitment 1 — Model documentation and information
controls.description: Draw up and keep up-to-date technical documentation and provide relevant information to downstream providers and the AI Office.

controls.title: Drawing up and maintaining model documentation
controls.description: Draw up and keep up-to-date model documentation per the Model Documentation Form, covering architecture, training data, evaluation, and known limitations.

controls.title: Providing information to downstream providers and AI Office
controls.description: Provide relevant information and documentation to downstream providers and the AI Office within 14 days of request.

controls.title: Quality, integrity, and security of information
controls.description: Ensure that documentation and information provided is accurate, complete, up-to-date, and protected against unauthorized modification.

controls.title: Chapter II — Copyright
controls.description: Copyright compliance obligations for all GPAI model providers under Article 53(1)(c) of the AI Act.

controls.title: Commitment 1 — Copyright policy and compliance
controls.description: Implement copyright compliance measures covering policy, lawful access, rights reservations, output safeguards, and rightholder engagement.

controls.title: Copyright policy
controls.description: Draw up, keep up-to-date, and implement a copyright policy addressing the use of copyrighted content in training data.

controls.title: Lawful access to copyright-protected content
controls.description: Reproduce and extract only lawfully accessible copyright-protected content for training purposes.

controls.title: Rights reservations compliance
controls.description: Identify and comply with rights reservations expressed through robots.txt, machine-readable protocols, and other mechanisms.

controls.title: Copyright-infringing output mitigation
controls.description: Implement technical safeguards to mitigate generation of copyright-infringing outputs.

controls.title: Rightholder point of contact
controls.description: Designate a point of contact and enable complaints from rightholders regarding copyright concerns.

controls.title: Chapter III — Safety and Security
controls.description: Safety and security obligations for providers of GPAI models with systemic risk under Article 55 of the AI Act.

controls.title: Commitment 1 — Safety and security framework
controls.description: Establish, implement, and maintain a safety and security framework for identifying, assessing, and mitigating systemic risks.

controls.title: Creating the safety and security framework
controls.description: Create a documented safety and security framework covering risk identification, analysis, mitigation, and governance for GPAI models with systemic risk.

controls.title: Implementing the framework
controls.description: Implement the safety and security framework across the model lifecycle including development, deployment, and post-market phases.

controls.title: Updating the framework
controls.description: Review and update the safety and security framework at least every 12 months and upon material changes to the risk landscape.

controls.title: Framework notifications to AI Office
controls.description: Notify the AI Office of the safety and security framework and material updates.

controls.title: Commitment 2 — Systemic risk identification
controls.description: Identify systemic risks that may arise from the development, deployment, or use of GPAI models.

controls.title: Systemic risk identification process
controls.description: Establish and execute a structured process for identifying systemic risks across specified categories (CBRN, CSAM, NCII, disinformation) and additional risk domains.

controls.title: Systemic risk scenarios
controls.description: Develop concrete systemic risk scenarios describing plausible pathways from model capabilities to societal-level harms.

controls.title: Commitment 3 — Systemic risk analysis
controls.description: Analyse identified systemic risks using state-of-the-art methods including model evaluations, red-teaming, and simulation.

controls.title: Model-independent information gathering
controls.description: Gather model-independent information relevant to systemic risk analysis including threat landscape, misuse patterns, and deployment context.

controls.title: Model evaluations
controls.description: Conduct model evaluations using benchmarks, task-based tests, red-teaming, human uplift evaluations, and simulation-based approaches.

controls.title: Systemic risk modelling
controls.description: Model systemic risks considering probability, severity, reversibility, scale, and cascading effects.

controls.title: Systemic risk estimation
controls.description: Estimate probability and severity of identified systemic risks using quantitative and qualitative methods.

controls.title: Post-market monitoring and external evaluation
controls.description: Implement continuous post-market monitoring and provide access to independent external evaluators for systemic risk assessment.

controls.title: Commitment 4 — Systemic risk acceptance determination
controls.description: Determine whether identified systemic risks are acceptable based on defined criteria and tiers.

controls.title: Risk acceptance criteria and tiers
controls.description: Define systemic risk acceptance criteria and establish risk tiers (acceptable, conditionally acceptable, unacceptable) with clear thresholds.

controls.title: Market placement decisions
controls.description: Make market placement, restriction, withdrawal, or recall decisions based on systemic risk acceptability assessment.

controls.title: Commitment 5 — Safety mitigations
controls.description: Implement appropriate and adversarially robust safety mitigations for identified systemic risks.

controls.title: Safety mitigation implementation
controls.description: Implement appropriate safety mitigations including training data filtering, input/output safeguards, fine-tuning, access staging, and tooling controls proportionate to identified risks.

controls.title: Commitment 6 — Security mitigations
controls.description: Implement appropriate cybersecurity protections for GPAI models with systemic risk.

controls.title: Security goal and threat actor definition
controls.description: Define security goals and identify relevant threat actors including nation-states, cybercriminals, insiders, and automated adversaries.

controls.title: Security mitigation implementation
controls.description: Implement security mitigations including access controls, model weight protection, infrastructure hardening, incident response, and supply chain security.

controls.title: Commitment 7 — Safety and security model reports
controls.description: Document and report on systemic risk identification, analysis, mitigation, and ongoing monitoring.

controls.title: Model description and behaviour documentation
controls.description: Document model description, capabilities, limitations, and observed behaviour relevant to systemic risk.

controls.title: Risk justification for market placement
controls.description: Document reasons for proceeding with market placement despite identified systemic risks, including risk-benefit analysis.

controls.title: Systemic risk documentation
controls.description: Document systemic risk identification, analysis results, mitigation measures applied, and residual risk assessment.

controls.title: External evaluator reports
controls.description: Incorporate and document findings from independent external evaluators in model reports.

controls.title: Material changes to risk landscape
controls.description: Document and assess material changes to the systemic risk landscape that may affect previously published risk assessments.

controls.title: Model report updates
controls.description: Keep model reports current by updating upon material changes, new risk discoveries, or at minimum every 12 months.

controls.title: Model report notifications
controls.description: Notify the AI Office of model report publications and material updates.

controls.title: Commitment 8 — Responsibility allocation
controls.description: Allocate clear responsibilities, resources, and promote healthy organizational risk culture for systemic risk management.

controls.title: Clear responsibility definition
controls.description: Define clear roles and responsibilities for systemic risk management across the organization.

controls.title: Resource allocation
controls.description: Allocate appropriate human, technical, and financial resources to systemic risk management activities.

controls.title: Organizational risk culture
controls.description: Promote a healthy organizational risk culture that encourages identification and escalation of systemic risk concerns.

controls.title: Commitment 9 — Serious incident reporting
controls.description: Track, document, and report serious incidents to the AI Office and national competent authorities.

controls.title: Incident tracking and documentation
controls.description: Establish processes to track and document serious incidents involving GPAI models with systemic risk.

controls.title: Incident reporting to authorities
controls.description: Report serious incidents to the AI Office and relevant national competent authorities with graduated response based on severity.

controls.title: Corrective actions
controls.description: Implement and document corrective actions in response to serious incidents, including model modifications, deployment restrictions, or recalls.

controls.title: Commitment 10 — Additional documentation and transparency
controls.description: Maintain comprehensive documentation of Safety and Security Chapter implementation and meet public transparency requirements.

controls.title: Implementation documentation
controls.description: Document implementation of all Safety and Security Chapter commitments and measures, including evidence of compliance.

controls.title: Public transparency
controls.description: Publish safety-relevant information proportionate to the model's risk profile, supporting public accountability and downstream provider decision-making.

changelog.change: Initial seed — 3 chapters, 12 commitments, 55 measures from final CoP (July 2025)
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
